title: binary-local and default trust policy
body:
When using a binary built via `binary-local` I get:

```
 $GOPATH/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/skopeo copy docker://fedora:24 oci:fedora-24-oci
FATA[0000] Error loading trust policy: open /etc/containers/policy.json: no such file or directory
```

I can see why:

```
install: install-binary install-docs install-completions
    install -D -m 644 default-policy.json ${CONTAINERSSYSCONFIGDIR}/policy.json
```

I think this is a valid bug?

Workaround:

```
$ sudo mkdir -p /etc/containers
$ sudo cp default-policy.json /etc/containers/policy.json
```
